---
title: 'Connect'
date: '1980-01-02T05:28:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'N2 Good Success Resource Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3852371530959272915'
blogger_filename: '/1980/01/connect.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/N2 Good Success Resource Center/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Connect </h4>
<br />
There are several ways to connect with me and they are:<br />
<ul>
<li>Email Me: <a href="mailto:N2GoodSuccess@gmail.com">N2GoodSuccess@gmail.com</a><a href="mailto:N2GoodSuccess@gmail.com" target="_blank"></a></li>
<li>Twitter: <a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe</a></li>
<li>Facebook: <a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a> </li>
</ul>
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Other Work</h4>
<br />
I like to keep busy, so here are other projects I work on when I have time:<br />
<ul>
<li><b>&nbsp;Bible Study Blog</b></li>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a></li>
</ul>
<li><b>Writing about Good Success</b></li>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://n2goodsuccess.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://n2goodsuccess.blogspot.com/</a><b> </b></li>
</ul>
<li><b>Reviews </b>of dining and activities in Fort Worth Texas</li>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/</a></li>
</ul>
<li><b>Crafts and More</b>, by my wife Flavia</li>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" target="_blank">www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a></li>
</ul>
</ul>
